title: Mistaken Identity
content:
There was a young fellow named Paul,
     Who went to a fancy dress ball;
        They say, just for fun
        He dressed up like a bun,
     And was "et" by a dog in the hall.
meaning:
Unknown's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "Mistaken Identity"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
